title: coreopsis calliopsidea
intro: Coreopsis calliopsidea, also known as Calliopsis or Calliopsis Coreopsis, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its roots, leaves, and flowers, which are used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Coreopsis calliopsidea include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis calliopsidea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy.
